cost_components_summary: No separate non-commodity residual cost is calibrated. Commodity production costs and upstream emissions should be represented by explicit supply pathways when authored.
input_basis_notes: No commodity input is attached to this placeholder; it exists to make the domestic carrier supply boundary explicit.
emissions_boundary_notes: No additional direct emissions are assigned here. Existing account_residual_mining_energy and account_energy_system_fugitive_emissions roles keep upstream energy-supply and fugitive releases visible until carrier-specific pathways are authored.
rollout_limit_notes: Single residual incumbent route; scenario control is by enabling or disabling the role method.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as a coarse carrier supply placeholder until explicit domestic fuel pathways are authored.
evidence_summary: Minimum viable residual coverage for domestic fuel supply roles using official energy and inventory boundary context.
derivation_method: Physical role graph migration placeholder with one residual activity unit and no additional direct emissions to avoid double counting existing mining and fugitive residuals.
review_notes: Residual stub for coverage and navigation, not an optimisable carrier supply technology representation.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into explicit extraction conversion transport storage and delivery pathways when carrier-specific source data support them.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Can map to a fixed calibration process or explicit carrier supply chain in TIMES-style models.
